label: Alpha Vantage
description: Fetch real-time and historical data for stocks, forex, crypto, and economic indicators via the Alpha Vantage REST API.

form.title: Connect Alpha Vantage
form.subtitle: Paste your Alpha Vantage API key to start pulling market and economic data.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste a free or premium Alpha Vantage API key. Takes about 30 seconds — no OAuth, no app setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Get an Alpha Vantage API Key

Alpha Vantage issues API keys directly from their website — no credit card required for the free tier.

### Steps

1. Go to [https://www.alphavantage.co/support/#api-key](https://www.alphavantage.co/support/#api-key) and click **Get Free API Key**.
2. Fill in the short form (name, email, intended use) and submit.
3. Your API key is displayed immediately on the confirmation page and also emailed to you. Copy it.
4. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

### Notes

- The free tier allows **25 requests per day** and **5 requests per minute**. If you need higher limits, upgrade to a premium plan at [https://www.alphavantage.co/premium/](https://www.alphavantage.co/premium/).
- The key is tied to your email address. You can retrieve it any time by revisiting the support page and re-submitting your email.
- Keep your key private — it is used as your sole credential for all API requests.
- Optionally set an **Output Format** (JSON or CSV) and a default **Data Type** below to pre-configure request defaults.

fields.name: api_key
